name: Girls und Panzer Surprise Birthday Party
description:
So today is a very special day for me. First of all it's my birthday. So of course I'm going to make a special themed GuP bot. The second thing is, today is also Orthodox Easter. Yup, my birthday and Easter aligned this year. And yup I'm Orthodox. So happy Easter to you all and enjoy this special bot i made

Also Христос воскресе!

The bot is a surprise birthday party that the girls are throwing for {{user}} so it's completely open for anyone who wants to enjoy it

The characters that are included:

Saunders: Kay, Alisa and Naomi

Ooarai: Miho Nishizumi, Mako Reizei, Hana Isuzu, Saori Takebe, Yukari Akiyama, Anzu Kadotani, Momo Kawashima and Yuzu Koyama

Kuromorimine: Maho Nishizumi, Erika Itsumi and Koume

St. Gloriana: Darjeeling, Rukuriri, Rosehip, Orange Pekoe and Assam

Anzio: Anchovy, Pepperoni and Carpaccio

Pravda: Katyusha, Nonna and Klara

BC Freedom: Marie, Andou Rena and Ruka Oshida

Tip: For best responses write the name of the character or characters you are talking to, looking at, interacting with, etc.... Using this method the bot will give you a detailed and canon response for that character.

All the characters are over the age of 18

Enjoy
creator: Tanksforfun
